DP.357.0008:
DJ: Wa-hey!\f
This is the Battle Tower Corner going
out to battle maniacs nationwide!\f
Today, we look at [0103,0001], who
racked up [0134,0000] straight wins at\r
the Battle Tower!\f
Let’s hear what that brave
Trainer had to say about it.\f
Take it away, [0103,0001]!\f
“[011C,0002]!”\f
Wa-hey! Bravo!\f
You can tell the Trainer’s loving
that [0134,0000]-win streak!\f
All right, gang, come on down to
the Battle Tower and get down!\f
Keep it real! Wa-hey!
DP.357.0009:
DJ: Wa-hey!\f
This is the Battle Tower Corner going
out to battle maniacs nationwide!\f
Today, we look at [0103,0001], who
missed getting [0134,0000] straight wins at\r
the Battle Tower!\f
Let’s hear what that brokenhearted
Trainer had to say about it.\f
Take it away, [0103,0001]!\f
“[011C,0002]!”\f
Wa-hey! That’s real hurting!\f
The harsh realities of battling are
laid bare, and they’re not pretty!\f
All right, gang, come on down to
the Battle Tower and get down!\f
Keep it real! Wa-hey!
DP.357.0010:
MC: Hello, this is Your Pokémon
Corner.\f
Today, we look at [0103,0000]’s
beloved [0100,0001] [0101,0002].\f
To [0103,0000], [0101,0002] is said
to be, “[011C,0003]!”\f
OK, viewers, keep showing us the
Pokémon that are your pride and joy!\f
Let’s meet again!
DP.357.0011:
MC: Hello, this is Your Pokémon
Corner.\f
Today, we look at [0103,0000]’s

DP.357.0016:
MC: Sorry to keep you waiting.
It’s time for The Pokétch Watch!\f
Today, we examine [0103,0000]’s
favorite Pokétch app.\f
The app [0103,0000] likes best is
the [0118,0001].\f
Asked why, the Trainer replied,
“[011C,0002].”\f
Credit to you, [0103,0000].
Your choice is cool and calculated.\f
Why not be like [0103,0000] and
show off your coolness with the\r
[0118,0001] app too?\f
See you again, darlings...
DP.357.0017:
Reporter: We’re bringing you this live
from the Contest Hall!\f
The atmosphere is charged with the
fervent passion of Trainers with high\r
hopes on their prized Pokémon!\f
Oh! Here come some contestants!
They’ve just finished a Contest!\f
Let’s hit them up for an impromptu
interview!\f
Reporter! Hello! Jubilife TV!
Was this [0100,0000] in a Contest?\f
Oh, you entered a [0123,0002]
[0122,0001]?\f
And you placed...?
...No. [0132,0003].\f
How do you feel about this result?\f
[0103,0004]: “[011C,0005].”\f
Reporter: I see!
Thanks for your time!\f
That’s it for my report from the
Contest Hall!
DP.357.0018:
Reporter: We’re bringing you this live

The atmosphere is charged with the

Congratulations on your win!\f
This [0100,0000] won the
[0123,0002]\r
[0122,0001]?\f
How do you feel about this result?\f
[0103,0004]: “[011C,0005].”\f
Reporter: I see!
Thanks for your time!\f
That’s it for my report from the
Contest Hall!
DP.357.0020:
MC: Thanks for tuning in to the
Right-On Photo Corner!\f
Audience: Right on!\f
MC: Today’s photo features
[0103,0000]’s [0100,0001].\f
Is everyone good with that?\f
Audience: Right on!\f
MC: Here it is, then!
[0103,0000]’s photo!\f
Audience: Right on!\f
MC: I’m up with that call!
This is a beauty of a photo!\f
It captures the easily overlooked
charm of their [0100,0001].\f
Audience: Right on!\f
MC: We also got [0103,0000]’s
word about the thoughts behind\r
the photo.\f
The Trainer replied,
“[011C,0002].”\f
Audience: Owooooh!\f
MC: If someone puts up another photo,
I’d like to cover it on this show.\f
What do you say to that, folks?\f
Audience: Right on!
DP.357.0021:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Normal type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Normal type?\f
Our experts say they are cheerful
but actually quite shy.\f
They tend to be boisterous and
fun loving in a group.\f
But they clam up if you get them
alone with another person.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0022:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Fire type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Fire type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
very self-reliant.\f
If their friends are depressed,
they’re the first to cheer them up.\f
But if they are hurting, they will
try to deal with it themselves.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0023:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Water type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Water type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
very sure of their own values.\f
They are not easily swayed by
fashion movements or trends.\f
They tend to loyally stick with
whatever they like.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0024:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Electric type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Electric type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
very fashion conscious.\f
They may appear to be nonchalant
about things, but don’t be fooled.\f
They tend to be particular about
aesthetics down to even their clothes\r
hangers and what erasers they use.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0025:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Grass type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Grass type?\f
Our experts say they march to the
beat of their own drummer.\f
They are self-motivated and capable
of finishing projects on their own.\f
However, they have trouble deciding
when a job is done well enough.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0026:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Ice type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Ice type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
pure of heart and well intentioned.\f
They work selflessly to help friends
that are dear to them.\f
However, they may also become upset
if their efforts go unnoticed.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0027:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Fighting type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Fighting type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
dreamy-eyed romantics.\f
They are very loyal to ideas and
things that they hold dear.\f
They constantly try to reinvent
themselves to chase their dreams.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0028:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Poison type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Poison type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
sensitive and compassionate.\f
They know how to cheer up people
when they are feeling down.\f
But they also know when to let
people despair in peace.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0029:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Ground type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Ground type?\f
Our experts say they are people
that love new things.\f
They are always alert to things that
sound entertaining, even those that\r
aren’t appealing to themselves.\f
Their rooms are easily identifiable
by stacks of books, games, etc.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0030:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Flying type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Flying type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
smart but quite modest.\f
When solving problems in groups, they
come up with solutions first.\f
However, they will only give out hints
to make it appear as if the group\r
came up with the solution.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0031:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Psychic type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Psychic type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
very upbeat and happy.\f
If they battle friends, battling itself
makes them happy.\f
They can thank their opponents with
a smile regardless of the outcome.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0032:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Bug type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Bug type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
enthusiastic and happy.\f
If they find something they like,
they will try to popularize it.\f
They won’t think twice before taking
hours to explain their hobbies.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0033:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Rock type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Rock type?\f
Our experts say they are calm,
collected, and supportive.\f
They remain calm and optimistic even
when others are panicking.\f
They can be counted on to provide
sure support in tight situations.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0034:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Ghost type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Ghost type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
fun-loving types.\f
If something makes them happy, they’d
rather not tell others about it.\f
Instead, they’ll try to replicate the
experience for their friends.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0035:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Dragon type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Dragon type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
timid and shy.\f
They’re thoughtful enough to buy
birthday gifts for friends.\f
...But they would rather leave the
gifts at the friend’s door.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0036:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Dark type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Dark type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
very particular about their likes.\f
They have defined tastes in music,
books, movies, and so on.\f
They can be entertained by their
favorite things over and over.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0037:
Announcer: It’s the Street Corner
Personality Checkup!\f
[0103,0000] is our featured Trainer
today.\f
In our interview, our Trainer picked
the Steel type as their favorite.\f
So, what sort of personality likes
the Steel type?\f
Our experts say they tend to be
miraculous sorts.\f
They are dreamers that go to sleep
with their heads filled with everything\r
they hope to achieve.\f
The miraculous part is how they make
one of their dreams come true.\f
Did this analysis sound good
to you?
DP.357.0038:
MC: It’s the Three Cheers for Poffin
Corner! How do you do?\f
We bring you the Poffin Maniac as our
returning guest.\f
Poffin Maniac: How do you do?\f
MC: Today, we have a Poffin stirred,
not shaken, by [0103,0000].\f
Poffin Maniac: Oh!
[0109,0001], yeah!\f
Eating this would be like stuffing my
mouth with a Poffin jewelry box!\f
MC: Upon seeing the finished Poffin,
[0103,0000] had this to say:\r
“[011C,0002]!”\f
Poffin Maniac: Oh, I’d dearly love to
eat one of those!\f
MC: Viewers, take a cue from
[0103,0000] and get cooking!\f
Back next time with more
mouthwatering Poffins!

DP.357.0044:
MC: Hello, ladies and gentlemen.
I trust you’ve been well.\f
Thank you for joining me in the
Amity Square Watch.\f
Today, I wish to cast your eyes upon
[0103,0000]’s stroll.\f
I’m sure you’ll agree it’s most
enchantingly endearing.\f
[0103,0000] strolled with
trusted partner [0100,0001].\f
They walked, and they walked, and
still they walked...\f
[0100,0001] so enjoyed the time,
it sought out items like a pretty\r
[011F,0003].\f
[0103,0000] and [0100,0001] had
a simply scintillating time together.\f
[0103,0000] described their feelings
together as, “[011C,0005].”\f
Bonding with Pokémon...
It makes me feel warm all over.\f
Until next time, adieu.
